items.caption: A large collection of elephant tusks and pangolin scales displayed on a table. the tusks are arranged in a circular pattern, while the scales are scattered around. there are two green signs with text on them, one of which is partially visible and reads "hong kong customs and excise department." the background features a green table with microphones and a few chairs, suggesting a formal setting. the text in the alt attribute indicates that this is a photo of illegal wildlife trade items seized in transit from nigeria to vietnam, with myanmar serving as a major transit point for such activities.
